page.title: Join a Team
page.invalidDescription: This invite link has expired or is invalid. Please ask your team admin for a new invite link.
page.previewTitle: You've been invited to join a team
page.authDescription: Sign in or create an account to join this team
page.successDescription: You've successfully joined {name}. Taking you to the dashboard...
page.alreadyMemberDescription: You are already a member of {name}. Head to the dashboard to get started.
